summary: Enhanced workflow plan output to describe step dependencies and completion conditions for multi-step issues. Updated controller.ex to show dependency relationships and completion conditions in plan comments, orchestrator.ex to include specific incomplete dependencies in blocking messages, and artifacts.ex to properly validate completion_conditions. Added comprehensive tests for dependency-bearing and dependency-free plans.
evidence: All 61 related tests pass (workflow_artifacts_test.exs, workflow_controller_test.exs, workflow_orchestrator_test.exs) - 0 failures
Uncommitted whitespace-only changes in presenter.ex and extensions_test.exs discarded

acceptance_criteria_validation.workflow_plan_represents_dependencies: PASS - edges between nodes supported, render_plan_comment shows dependency edges and per-node (depends on: ...) info
acceptance_criteria_validation.existing_simple_plans_valid: PASS - completion_conditions is optional (nil accepted), valid_node? handles absent field
acceptance_criteria_validation.runner_explains_blocked_dependencies: PASS - describe_blocking_dependencies lists specific incomplete deps with status and conditions
acceptance_criteria_validation.schema_parser_tests_coverage: PASS - 6 new tests: dependency-bearing plans, dependency-free plans, multiple dependencies, invalid edge references, valid/invalid completion_conditions

decisions: Consolidated valid_node? function to properly validate completion_conditions using Map.get
Added completion_conditions field to node description in node_description function
Updated render_plan_comment to show dependency relationships with depends on and completion conditions
Updated describe_blocking_dependencies to include specific incomplete dependencies with their status and conditions
Added completion_conditions example to planner prompt (prompts.ex)
next_handoff: Ready for review. All acceptance criteria met: dependency representation in workflow plans, existing simple plans remain valid, blocking messages explain dependencies, and comprehensive tests added.
